outlook.summary: Despite heavily bearish sentiment indicated by extreme Put/Call ratios and a volatility smirk, the massive positive Total GEX (3.40B) suggests market makers are aggressively long gamma. Expect structural pinning between the 710 Resonance and 715 Call Wall. A breakout above 715 is required to establish bullish momentum, while 700 acts as an impenetrable lower boundary.

Major support aligning in Weekly (62.5k Put OI) and Monthly (81.3k Put OI). Deep downside buffer backed by institutional positioning.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to extreme positive GEX across all expiries
outlook.summary: The market is characterized by massive positive GEX (Total 59.55B), indicating dealers are heavily long gamma. This environment suppresses volatility and promotes mean-reversion towards key strikes. Bearish put skew and high PCR reflect strong hedging activity, but the positive GEX structure stabilizes the market well above the 0DTE Gamma Flip at 7047. Spot is trapped between major resistance at 7200-7265 and ultimate structural support at 6900.

levels.motivazione: Ultimate structural support with the highest Put OI across all expirations (23k in 0DTE, 29k in Monthly). Represents a massive institutional hedge level.

0DTE Max Pain level situated very close to the Gamma Flip, serving as an attractive target for market makers.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Positive GEX above this point stabilizes the market, suppressing volatility and supporting prices.
